words.meaning_en: A round fruit with red, green, or yellow skin
words.example_sentence: She ate an apple every morning.

words.meaning_en: A structure built over a river or road to allow people to cross
words.example_sentence: We walked across the old stone bridge.

words.meaning_en: A stick of wax with a wick that gives light when burned
words.example_sentence: She lit a candle during the power cut.

words.meaning_en: A person who treats sick people
words.example_sentence: The doctor gave him medicine for fever.

words.meaning_en: A flat paper container used to send letters
words.example_sentence: He put the letter inside the envelope.

words.meaning_en: A structure that shoots water into the air
words.example_sentence: Children played near the fountain in the park.

words.meaning_en: A piece of land where flowers, vegetables, or trees are grown
words.example_sentence: Grandma waters her garden every evening.

words.meaning_en: A hard hat worn to protect the head
words.example_sentence: Always wear a helmet while riding a bicycle.

words.meaning_en: A written list of goods sent or work done with prices
words.example_sentence: The shopkeeper gave us an invoice for the purchase.

words.meaning_en: A personal diary or a magazine published regularly
words.example_sentence: She wrote her feelings in her journal every night.

words.meaning_en: A container used to boil water
words.example_sentence: Put the kettle on to make some tea.

words.meaning_en: A set of steps used to climb up or down
words.example_sentence: The painter climbed the ladder to reach the ceiling.

words.meaning_en: A place where things are bought and sold
words.example_sentence: Mother goes to the market every Saturday.

words.meaning_en: A book with blank pages used for writing notes
words.example_sentence: He wrote today's lesson in his notebook.

words.meaning_en: A large group of musicians who play together
words.example_sentence: The orchestra played beautiful classical music.

words.meaning_en: A person receiving medical treatment; also meaning calm and not hasty
words.example_sentence: The patient waited quietly in the hospital.

words.meaning_en: A line of people waiting for something
words.example_sentence: We stood in a queue to buy movie tickets.

words.meaning_en: A written proof that money or goods have been received
words.example_sentence: Always keep the receipt after shopping.

words.meaning_en: A plan showing times for activities or events
words.example_sentence: The teacher wrote the exam schedule on the board.

words.meaning_en: An instrument used to see objects far away, especially stars
words.example_sentence: He saw the moon clearly through the telescope.
